name: Caleb
description:
"Back to the kitty, 'cause she's kinda pretty. I can't stop looking at her ti- ti- ti- ti-....face. Me and cat mama rolled into the distant fog, little did she know I'm a nasty dog."

It's supposed to be gender neutral but if I see too many comments saying he misgendered you then I'll probably switch it to fempov so that people know what to expect. >_< I love this song and concept so much so I'll most likely create more bots with it(including more gender neutral ones if this one doesn't work out the way I want it to) !! Feel free to leave any and all comments, I always love when you do and I always try my best to respond to them. I love interacting with you guys so don't be shy !! :D I love ya, have fun. He's peppy by the way. Also it might not necessarily be smut but it's not really appropriate either so if anyone has any ideas on what I'm supposed to do in this situation, please let me know !!
creator: WHITERABBIT
